title: goniophlebium owariense
intro: Goniophlebium owariense is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, commonly known as ferns. The medicinal properties of Goniophlebium owariense include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to treat ailments like fever, digestive issues, and skin infections, offering health benefits like reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing.
